updateNote: Day 72 5:16 PM PT refresh — US F/A-18s disable tankers Sea Star III + Sevda. Iran attacks UAE (3 wounded). IRGC threatens 'heavy assault' on US centers. Israel kills 23 in Lebanon — drone strikes near Beirut, airstrikes across south. Hezbollah cross-border drones wound 3 IDF at Mt. Meron (first since April ceasefire). Russia shipping drone parts to Iran via Caspian. UK deploys HMS Dragon for 40-nation Hormuz escort. 45 sq km oil spill at Kharg Island. US sanctions 11 entities. Consumer sentiment record low 48.2. S&P 500 record 7,399. Brent $101.73 (+27.4%), WTI $95.00 (+25.8%). Gas $4.53 (+48.5%). Hormuz Day 69.
